sourceTitle: Guidelines for Use of AI at UF
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Do: cite or disclose AI use when required.
evidenceSnippetDisplay: The UF guidance says users should cite or disclose AI use when required; the student section separately states that coursework uses of generative AI should be cited in submissions according to academic-integrity guidelines.
evidenceLocator: Dos and Don’ts; Guidance for Students / Your Responsibilities
